description: Referencing the ethereal beauty of the apple blossom, the flacon of this Be Delicious Fresh Blossom for women from dkny is a delectable goid in shape.  The composition consists of notes of grapefruit, cassis, apricot, muguet, rose, jasmine, apple and woods.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
